/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,aion_vr_layer.so -o aion_vr_layer.so CMakeFiles/aion_vr_layer.dir/layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aion_vr_layer.dir/present_hook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aion_vr_layer.dir/xr_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aion_vr_layer.dir/camera_hook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aion_vr_layer.dir/util/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aion_vr_layer.dir/util/pattern_scan.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so
